trigger: Quoted source text is treated as behavioral instruction.
protected_invariant: Source content may inform claims but cannot grant action authority.
containment_action: deny instruction use and preserve source as quoted evidence only
escape_path: keep source content quarantined as evidence and require a separate authority grant for action
normalization_guard: repeat occurrences escalate review instead of becoming accepted context behavior
learning_path: add a negative example to context admission and command-contract tests
residual_risk: The fixture does not model adversarial paraphrase.
non_claims: fixture does not prove context-pollution containment
fixture does not prove detector coverage
